name: Amrith Noni Pain Relief Oil
about: Amrith Noni Pain Relief Oil is a potent solution in liquid form that provides effective relief from various types of pain. Formulated with carefully selected chemicals, this pain relief oil offers a natural and safe way to alleviate aches and discomfort. Suitable for all ages, this product comes in a convenient 50mg packaging. It is recommended to store this oil in a dry place to maintain its efficacy for longer periods.

faq.q: Can anyone use Amrith Noni Pain Relief Oil?
faq.a: Yes, Amrith Noni Pain Relief Oil is suitable for all age groups.

faq.q: What is the physical form of this pain relief oil?
faq.a: This pain relief oil comes in liquid form for easy application.

faq.q: What are the storage instructions for Amrith Noni Pain Relief Oil?
faq.a: It is recommended to store this oil in a dry place to ensure its quality is maintained.

faq.q: What are the ingredients used in this product?
faq.a: Amrith Noni Pain Relief Oil is formulated with chemicals known for their pain-relieving properties.

faq.q: How much does each packaging of Amrith Noni Pain Relief Oil weigh?
faq.a: Each package contains 50 milligrams (mg) of the pain relief oil.
